metadata.description: Use CloudGrid to go from idea to a live, running app. Skills + MCP for brainstorming, planning, building, and running apps, games, landing pages, dashboards, and full-stack projects on a live runtime with managed databases, cache, disk, and AI - for technical and non-technical users.

plugins.name: cloudgrid
plugins.description: Use CloudGrid to build and run real apps from a conversation: brainstorm, plan, build (games, landing pages, dashboards, full-stack), declare managed databases, cache, disk, and AI in one line, and go live at a public URL. Bundles the CloudGrid MCP.
